HGSS.611.0000:
Hiya, kid!\f
I see you’re new in Mahogany Town.
Since you’re new, you should try a\r
yummy RageCandyBar!\f
Right now, it can be yours for just
$300! Want one? [0200,0000]
HGSS.611.0001:
I don’t want to upset you after
buying one from me, but...\f
Buying a RageCandyBar has nothing to
do with whether I’d allow you to\r
pass through here.\f
...Johto has many places to visit,
such as the Lighthouse at Olivine and\r
the Pharmacy at Cianwood.\f
Why don’t you slow down and
enjoy sightseeing?
HGSS.611.0002:
I don’t want to upset you after
buying one from me, but...\f
Buying a RageCandyBar has nothing to
do with whether I’d allow you to\r
pass through here.\f
...Johto has many places to visit,
such as the Lighthouse at Olivine and\r
the Pharmacy at Cianwood.\f
Why don’t you slow down and
enjoy sightseeing?\f
HGSS.611.0003:
What? RageCandyBar?
You want to buy one?\f
Right on!\f
Same as before, it can be yours for
just $300! Want one? [0200,0000]
HGSS.611.0004:
What? RageCandyBar?
You want to buy another?\f
I think one is enough for you.
HGSS.611.0005:
I remember a person from as far as
Kanto came to buy one a long time ago.\f
I happened to have none in stock then.
That person left rather upset.\f
I felt kind of sorry for that.
HGSS.611.0006:
I remember a person from as far as
Kanto came to buy one a long time ago.\f
I happened to have none in stock then.
That person left rather upset.\f
I felt kind of sorry for that.\f
HGSS.611.0013:
Have you seen this guy with a
black cape?\f
He has been going back and forth
between here and the Lake of Rage\r
saying strange radio waves are\r
being transmitted.\f
Who is he, I wonder.
HGSS.611.0014:
Are you off to see the GYARADOS
rampage at the lake?
HGSS.611.0015:
MAGIKARP have returned to
Lake of Rage.\f
That should be splendid news for the
anglers there.
HGSS.611.0016:
Visit Grandma’s shop. She sells
stuff that nobody else has...\f
You want to buy stuff, right?
So buy stuff at my grandma’s!
HGSS.611.0017:
Mahogany Town
Home of the Ninja
HGSS.611.0018:
Just a Souvenir Shop\f
Nothing Suspicious about It
No Need to Be Alarmed
HGSS.611.0019:
Mahogany Town Pokémon Gym
Leader: Pryce\r
